title: Review of electricity market arrangements (REMA): autumn update, 2024
body: "This document provides an update on policy development within the Review of electricity market arrangements (REMA) programme and how our vision for electricity market reform sits alongside the Clean Power 2030 Action Plan.  This REMA publication outlines developing policy options for strengthening locational and operational signals in the electricity market. It also provides an update on our evolving thinking regarding longer-term reforms to both the Contracts for Difference (CfD) and Capacity Market schemes, and the role they will need to play beyond 2030.   This update has been published alongside the summary of consultation responses to the second REMA consultation. We aim to conclude policy development by around mid-2025 before moving into implementation of final decision making.  "
